name: faraday-maxwell-and-the-electromagnetic-field
description: Nancy Forbes and Basil Mahon's 'Faraday, Maxwell, and the Electromagnetic Field' — the story of how two men, a self-taught experimental genius and a brilliant mathematician, together created the theory of the electromagnetic field. Faraday's experiments with electricity and magnetism laid the groundwork. Maxwell's equations unified electricity, magnetism, and light into a single theory.
